about.title: About
about.p1: Zorya Tech Studio is an independent mobile development studio. We build apps that combine thoughtful design with solid engineering.
about.p2: Our goal is to create useful everyday tools with attention to detail and user experience.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: What we're working on
projects.empty: Projects are in development. Stay tuned!

senso.name: Senso
senso.subtitle: Smart sensors in your pocket
senso.desc_short: An Android measurement toolkit: level, lux meter, decibel meter, compass. All calculations run on-device.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Zorya Tech Studio ("we", "us", "our") built the Senso app — a measurement toolkit for Android. This Privacy Policy explains how we handle information when you use the app.
privacy.collect_text: We do not collect any personal data. The app requires no registration, account, or sign-in. We do not request or store your name, email, phone number, or any other personally identifiable information.
privacy.storage_text: All measurements, settings, and calibrations are stored exclusively on your device (SharedPreferences for settings, SQLite for measurement history). No data is transmitted to our servers — we do not operate any server infrastructure for storing user data.
privacy.permissions_text: Senso uses device sensors strictly for in-app, real-time calculations. All raw data stays in memory and is not transmitted anywhere:
privacy.permissions_mic: Microphone — used by the Decibel Meter to measure sound level. Audio is analysed frame-by-frame (RMS, A-weighting) and never recorded.
privacy.permissions_camera: Camera — used by the Camera Level mode (horizon overlay) and by the Camera fallback mode in the Lux Meter (frame brightness estimation). Frames are not stored or transmitted.
privacy.permissions_location: Location — used to compute magnetic declination (True North) in the Compass via the WMM-2025 model. Coordinates are used once for the math and not transmitted anywhere.
privacy.third_text: Senso displays ads via Google AdMob (a banner on the Settings and History screens, and a full-screen interstitial between tools). AdMob may collect device identifiers, IP address, and usage data per its own policy:
privacy.third_admob: displays ads. May collect device identifiers, IP address, and usage data for serving personalized or non-personalized ads.
privacy.children_text: Senso is not directed at children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect information from children under 13. If you believe your child has provided us with any information, please contact us and we will delete it.
privacy.changes_text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date.
privacy.contact_text: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

taro.name: Starlit Tarot
taro.subtitle: Tarot for reflection & study
taro.desc_short: An offline self-reflection tarot app: all 78 Rider-Waite-Smith cards, a daily card, spreads (1 / 3 / Celtic Cross), card meanings, a study mode and a journal. No accounts, no tracking — your content stays on your device. Ad-supported, with an optional one-time purchase to remove ads.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Zorya Tech Studio ("we", "us", "our") built Starlit Tarot — a tarot app for self-reflection, personal insight, education and entertainment for Android. Starlit Tarot is intended for self-reflection, personal insight and entertainment. It does not predict the future and is not a substitute for professional medical, psychological, legal or financial advice. Recommended for ages 18+. This Privacy Policy explains how we handle information when you use the app.
privacy.collect_text: We do not collect personally identifiable information ourselves. The app requires no registration, account, or sign-in, and we do not request or store your name, email address, or phone number. However, the advertising and billing services we use (Google AdMob and Google Play Billing) may collect a device advertising identifier, IP address, and app-usage data in accordance with their own policies.
privacy.storage_text: Your daily card, readings, journal entries, study progress and settings are stored exclusively on your device using Hive and SharedPreferences — we do not operate any server infrastructure for storing this content. The app connects to the internet only to load ads and to process the optional one-time "remove ads" purchase.
privacy.permissions_text: Starlit Tarot requests only minimal permissions. It uses internet access solely to serve ads (Google AdMob) and to process purchases (Google Play Billing), plus a notifications permission for the optional daily reminder. It does not access the microphone, camera, location, contacts, or any other sensitive device data.
privacy.permissions_notifications: Notifications (POST_NOTIFICATIONS) — used solely for the optional local daily-reminder notification. It is scheduled on your device; nothing is sent anywhere, and you can disable it at any time.
privacy.third_text: Starlit Tarot displays ads via Google AdMob (a banner on the Library and Journal screens, and an occasional full-screen interstitial). AdMob may collect device identifiers, IP address, and usage data under Google's own privacy policy. The app also offers a one-time "remove ads" in-app purchase processed by Google Play Billing; we never receive or store your payment details. These services operate under their own privacy policies.
privacy.children_text: Starlit Tarot is not directed at children. It is recommended for ages 18+ and is offered as a reference and reflection tool. We do not knowingly collect information from children.
privacy.changes_text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date.
privacy.contact_text: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

offer.title: Terms of Use
offer.intro: This document is a public offer by Zorya Tech Studio ("Studio", "we") regarding the use of the Starlit Tarot mobile app (the "App"). Starlit Tarot is intended for self-reflection, personal insight and entertainment. It does not predict the future and is not a substitute for professional medical, psychological, legal or financial advice. Recommended for ages 18+. By downloading, installing, or using the App, you (the "User") unconditionally accept all terms of this Agreement. If you do not agree to any of the terms, please do not use the App.
offer.definitions_text: App — the Starlit Tarot mobile application for Android, distributed via Google Play. Parties — the Studio and the User. Agreement — these Terms of Use together with the Privacy Policy.
offer.subject_text: The Studio grants the User the right to use the App free of charge for personal, non-commercial purposes subject to this Agreement. The App is free to download: it displays the 78 Rider-Waite-Smith cards, a daily card, spreads, card meanings, a study mode and a journal. The card content works offline; the App is ad-supported, with an optional one-time purchase to remove ads.
offer.acceptance_text: Acceptance of this offer occurs through any of the following actions: downloading the App from Google Play, installing it on a device, or actually using it. From the moment of acceptance, this Agreement is deemed concluded between the Studio and the User.
offer.license_text: The Studio grants the User a non-exclusive, royalty-free, revocable, non-transferable license to install and use the App on Android devices owned or lawfully controlled by the User. The license remains in force for as long as the User uses the App and is limited to personal, non-commercial use.
offer.restrictions_reverse: decompile, disassemble, or reverse-engineer the App, except as expressly permitted by applicable law;
offer.restrictions_modify: modify, adapt, translate, or create derivative works based on the App;
offer.restrictions_distribute: copy, distribute, sell, rent, sublicense, or otherwise commercially exploit the App or any part of it;
offer.restrictions_circumvent: circumvent or attempt to circumvent any technical protection measures of the App.
offer.ads_text: The App is ad-supported and displays ads via Google AdMob — a banner on the Library and Journal screens and an occasional full-screen interstitial after a completed reading. The daily card is shown without interstitials. By using the App, the User consents to the display of ads; the related data collection is governed by Google's policy and is described in our Privacy Policy. All ads can be removed with a one-time in-app purchase.
offer.iap_text: The App offers a single optional in-app purchase — a one-time "remove ads" purchase processed by the Google Play billing system. All purchases are handled by Google; the Studio does not receive payment card data. Every app feature remains fully available whether or not you buy it; there is no subscription or premium content locked behind a paywall.
offer.ugc_text: The App allows the User to keep journal entries and reflection notes. Such content is stored exclusively on the User's device and is not transmitted to the Studio. The User is solely responsible for the content they create.
offer.ip_text: All exclusive proprietary rights to the App, including its code, design, text, and other components, belong to the Studio. The Rider-Waite-Smith card images used are based on the 1909 deck, which is in the public domain. This Agreement does not transfer any intellectual property rights in the App to the User, other than the limited license to use expressly granted herein.
offer.warranty_text: The App is provided "as is" and "as available", without warranties of any kind, express or implied. Starlit Tarot is a tool for self-reflection, personal insight and entertainment; it does not predict the future and is not a substitute for professional medical, psychological, legal or financial advice. The Studio does not warrant that the App will meet all User expectations or operate without faults on every device.
offer.liability_text: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, the Studio is not liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising out of the use or inability to use the App, including any decisions made on the basis of card interpretations, or loss of data stored locally on the User's device. The User uses the App at their own discretion and risk.
offer.privacy_text: The handling of information when using the App is governed by a separate document — the Privacy Policy — which forms an integral part of this Agreement.
offer.termination_text: The User may stop using the App at any time by uninstalling it from their device. The Studio reserves the right to discontinue the App or any of its features upon notice via a Google Play update or on the Studio's website. Termination does not relieve either Party from obligations that arose prior to such termination.
offer.changes_text: The Studio reserves the right to unilaterally modify the terms of this Agreement. The current version is always posted on this page with the effective date. Continued use of the App after changes constitutes the User's acceptance of the new version.
offer.law_text: This Agreement is governed by the laws of Ukraine. Any disputes arising in connection with this Agreement shall first be resolved through negotiations between the Parties; failing that, in court in accordance with the laws of Ukraine.
offer.contact_text: Questions about the terms of this Agreement can be sent to:

alias.name: Alias
alias.subtitle: Party word game for friends
alias.desc_short: A pass-and-play party word game with 35+ categories and 14 languages. Explain words to your team without using them — beat the clock.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Zorya Tech Studio ("we", "us", "our") built the Alias app — a pass-and-play party word game for Android. This Privacy Policy explains how we handle information when you use the app.
privacy.collect_text: We do not collect any personal data. The app requires no registration, account, or sign-in. We do not request or store your name, email address, phone number, or any other personally identifiable information.
privacy.storage_text: All game settings, custom word lists, and team names are stored exclusively on your device using SharedPreferences. No game data is transmitted to our servers — we do not operate any server infrastructure for storing user data.
privacy.permissions_text: Alias requests only the minimum permissions required to display ads. The app does not access the microphone, camera, location, contacts, or any other sensitive device data.
privacy.permissions_internet: Internet — required to load ads from Google AdMob. The app itself works fully offline; only ad loading uses the network.
privacy.permissions_ad_id: Advertising ID (AD_ID) — used by Google AdMob to serve relevant ads. You can reset or opt out of this identifier at any time in your device's Google settings.
privacy.third_text: Alias displays ads via Google AdMob (a banner on the home screen and a full-screen interstitial between rounds). AdMob may collect device identifiers, IP address, and usage data per its own policy:
privacy.third_admob: displays ads. May collect device identifiers, IP address, and usage data for serving personalized or non-personalized ads.
privacy.children_text: Alias is not directed at children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect information from children under 13. If you believe your child has provided us with any information, please contact us and we will delete it.
privacy.changes_text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date.
privacy.contact_text: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

ytaudit.name: YouTube Audit
ytaudit.subtitle: Math-based YouTube channel audit
ytaudit.desc_short: Audit public YouTube channels via the official API: 70+ metrics and 50+ recommendations. No sign-in, all data stays on your device.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Zorya Tech Studio ("we", "us", "our") built the YouTube Audit app — a tool for math-based audits of public YouTube channels. This Privacy Policy explains how we handle information when you use the app.
privacy.collect_text: We do not collect any personal data. The app requires no registration, account, or sign-in with Google/YouTube. We do not request or store your name, email, phone number, or any other personally identifiable information.
privacy.storage_text: All audit results, history, settings, and daily-limit counters are stored exclusively on your device (SharedPreferences for settings, Hive for audit history). No data is transmitted to our servers — we do not operate any server infrastructure for storing user data.
privacy.permissions_text: YouTube Audit requests only the minimum permissions required. The app does not use the microphone, camera, location, contacts, or any other sensitive device data:
privacy.permissions_internet: Internet — required to call the YouTube Data API v3 (fetching public channel metadata, playlists, and video statistics) and to load Google AdMob ads.
privacy.permissions_ad_id: Advertising ID (AD_ID) — used by Google AdMob to serve relevant ads. You can reset or opt out of this identifier at any time in your device's Google settings.
privacy.youtube_text: The app uses the YouTube Data API v3 with a server API key to fetch only public information about the channel you provide (URL or {'@'}handle): channel metadata, video list, view counts, and comment stats. YouTube Audit does NOT use OAuth and has no access to private data, private videos, analytics, or any information tied to your Google account. Use of YouTube data is governed by the YouTube Terms of Service and the Google Privacy Policy.
privacy.third_text: YouTube Audit displays ads via Google AdMob (a banner on main screens, a full-screen interstitial between audits, and rewarded ads for extra audits) and queries public data via the YouTube Data API. These services may collect data per their own policies:
privacy.third_admob: displays ads. May collect device identifiers, IP address, and usage data for serving personalized or non-personalized ads.
privacy.third_youtube: provides public channel data via the YouTube Data API v3. Requests are processed under the YouTube Terms of Service and the Google Privacy Policy.
privacy.children_text: YouTube Audit is not directed at children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect information from children under 13. If you believe your child has provided us with any information, please contact us and we will delete it.
privacy.changes_text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date.
privacy.contact_text: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

offer.title: Terms of Use
offer.intro: This document is a public offer by Zorya Tech Studio ("Studio", "we") regarding the use of the YouTube Audit mobile app (the "App"). By downloading, installing, or using the App, you (the "User") unconditionally accept all terms of this Agreement. If you do not agree to any of the terms, please do not use the App.
offer.definitions_text: App — the YouTube Audit mobile application for Android, distributed via Google Play. Parties — the Studio and the User. Agreement — these Terms of Use together with the Privacy Policy.
offer.subject_text: The Studio grants the User the right to use the App free of charge for personal, non-commercial purposes subject to this Agreement. The App performs a math-based audit of public YouTube channels and is distributed on an ad-supported model: all functionality is free, with a daily limit of audits that can be extended by watching rewarded ads.
offer.acceptance_text: Acceptance of this offer occurs through any of the following actions: downloading the App from Google Play, installing it on a device, or actually using it. From the moment of acceptance, this Agreement is deemed concluded between the Studio and the User.
offer.license_text: The Studio grants the User a non-exclusive, royalty-free, revocable, non-transferable license to install and use the App on Android devices owned or lawfully controlled by the User. The license remains in force for as long as the User uses the App and is limited to personal, non-commercial use.
offer.youtube_text: The App uses the YouTube Data API v3 with a server API key to fetch only public information about the channel the User provides (URL or {'@'}handle): channel metadata, video list, view counts, and comment stats. The App does NOT use OAuth and has no access to private data or any information tied to the User's Google account. By using the App, the User also agrees to be bound by the YouTube Terms of Service (https://www.youtube.com/t/terms), and acknowledges that YouTube data is handled in accordance with the Google Privacy Policy (https://policies.google.com/privacy).
offer.restrictions_reverse: decompile, disassemble, or reverse-engineer the App, except as expressly permitted by applicable law;
offer.restrictions_modify: modify, adapt, translate, or create derivative works based on the App;
offer.restrictions_distribute: copy, distribute, sell, rent, sublicense, or otherwise commercially exploit the App or any part of it;
offer.restrictions_circumvent: circumvent or attempt to circumvent any technical protection measures, ad-display mechanisms, daily audit limits, or the YouTube API.
offer.ads_text: The App contains ads served by Google AdMob (a banner on main screens, a full-screen interstitial during an audit, and rewarded ads that grant extra audits). Ads fund the free version of the App. By using the App, the User consents to the display of ads. Data collection by the ad network is governed by Google's policy and is described in our Privacy Policy.
offer.ip_text: All exclusive proprietary rights to the App, including its code, design, graphics, text, metrics, recommendation logic, and other components, belong to the Studio. This Agreement does not transfer any intellectual property rights in the App to the User, other than the limited license to use expressly granted herein. YouTube and Google are trademarks of Google LLC; the Studio is not affiliated with or endorsed by Google.
offer.warranty_text: The App is provided "as is" and "as available", without warranties of any kind, express or implied, including warranties of fitness for a particular purpose, accuracy of audit results, error-free operation, or uninterrupted availability. Audit results are informational estimates based on public data and do not constitute professional advice. The Studio does not warrant that the App will meet all User expectations or operate without faults on every device.
offer.liability_text: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, the Studio is not liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising out of the use or inability to use the App, decisions made based on audit results, loss of data stored locally on the User's device, or actions of third-party services (Google Play, AdMob, the YouTube Data API).
offer.privacy_text: The handling of information when using the App is governed by a separate document — the Privacy Policy — which forms an integral part of this Agreement.
offer.termination_text: The User may stop using the App at any time by uninstalling it from their device. The Studio reserves the right to discontinue the App or any of its features upon notice via a Google Play update or on the Studio's website. Termination does not relieve either Party from obligations that arose prior to such termination.
offer.changes_text: The Studio reserves the right to unilaterally modify the terms of this Agreement. The current version is always posted on this page with the effective date. Continued use of the App after changes constitutes the User's acceptance of the new version.
offer.law_text: This Agreement is governed by the laws of Ukraine. Any disputes arising in connection with this Agreement shall first be resolved through negotiations between the Parties; failing that, in court in accordance with the laws of Ukraine.

sudokulens.name: SudokuLens
sudokulens.subtitle: Smart Sudoku Solver
sudokulens.desc_short: Solve any Sudoku instantly by scanning it with your camera or entering it manually. Supports 4×4 to 16×16 grids, step-by-step solving with techniques, a puzzle generator, 8 themes, and 8 languages.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Zorya Tech Studio ("we", "us", "our") built the SudokuLens app. This Privacy Policy explains how we handle information when you use our app.
privacy.collect_text: We do not collect any personal data. The app does not require registration, account creation, or sign-in. We do not request or store your name, email address, phone number, or any other personally identifiable information.
privacy.storage_text: Your puzzle history and settings are stored exclusively on your device using SharedPreferences. No data is transmitted to our servers. We do not operate any server infrastructure for storing user data.
privacy.permissions_text: To recognize Sudoku puzzles, the app can use your device camera or images you choose from your photo library. Image recognition runs entirely on your device (Google ML Kit, offline). Photos and camera frames are processed locally and are never uploaded to our servers or shared with third parties.
privacy.third_text: Our app uses the following third-party services that may collect certain information in accordance with their own privacy policies:
privacy.third_admob: displays ads (banner, interstitial, and rewarded). May collect device identifiers and data for ad serving.

privacy.contact_text: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

autoObd2.name: OBD2 Auto Codes
autoObd2.subtitle: Offline OBD-II trouble code reference
autoObd2.desc_short: An offline Android reference for OBD-II / DTC fault codes with plain-language explanations, likely causes, favorites, and quick Google / YouTube search links.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Zorya Tech Studio ("we", "us", "our") built the OBD2 Auto Codes app — an offline Android reference for OBD-II / DTC vehicle trouble codes. This Privacy Policy explains how we handle information when you use the app.
privacy.collect_text: We do not collect personal data directly. The app requires no registration, account, or sign-in. We do not request or store your name, email address, phone number, vehicle VIN, license plate, or any other personally identifiable information.
privacy.storage_text: The bundled diagnostic-code database, your favorites, and app settings are stored locally on your device using SQLite and SharedPreferences. We do not operate any backend or cloud account for this app, and the app does not upload your favorites or search history to our servers.
privacy.permissions_text: OBD2 Auto Codes requests only the minimum permissions required for advertising and opening external help links. The app does not access the microphone, camera, location, contacts, Bluetooth, or files on your device:
privacy.permissions_internet: Internet — required to load Google AdMob ads and to open Google or YouTube search pages when you explicitly tap those buttons.
privacy.permissions_ad_id: Advertising ID (AD_ID) — may be used by Google AdMob to serve relevant ads. You can reset or limit this identifier in your Google / Android settings.
privacy.external_text: The app includes optional buttons that open Google Search or YouTube Search for the selected diagnostic code in your browser or another app on your device. These searches run only after your tap. We do not proxy, log, or store the content of those external requests on our own servers.
privacy.third_text: OBD2 Auto Codes displays ads via Google AdMob. AdMob may collect device identifiers, IP address, and usage data according to Google's own privacy policy. When you open Google or YouTube links, those services also process your request under their own terms and privacy policies.
privacy.children_text: OBD2 Auto Codes is not directed at children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect information from children under 13. If you believe a child has provided us with any personal information, please contact us and we will take appropriate steps.
privacy.changes_text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date.
privacy.contact_text: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

offer.title: Terms of Use
offer.intro: This document is a public offer by Zorya Tech Studio ("Studio", "we") regarding the use of the OBD2 Auto Codes mobile app (the "App"). By downloading, installing, or using the App, you (the "User") unconditionally accept all terms of this Agreement. If you do not agree to any of the terms, please do not use the App.

offer.subject_text: The Studio grants the User the right to use the App free of charge for personal, non-commercial purposes subject to this Agreement. The App provides an offline reference database of OBD-II / DTC fault codes, code descriptions, likely causes, favorites, and external search shortcuts.

offer.restrictions_circumvent: circumvent or attempt to circumvent technical protection measures, advertising mechanisms, or any integrity checks of the App.
offer.ads_text: The App contains ads served by Google AdMob, including banner ads and full-screen interstitials. Ads support the free distribution of the App. Data collection by the ad network is governed by Google's own policies and is described in our Privacy Policy.
offer.iap_text: As of the effective date of this Agreement, the App does not offer active in-app purchases or subscriptions. If paid features are introduced in the future, the relevant terms will be updated on this page and in the Google Play listing.
offer.search_text: The App may offer quick links to Google Search and YouTube Search for a diagnostic code. Those links are provided only as a convenience and open third-party services outside the App. The Studio does not control and is not responsible for the content, accuracy, or availability of external websites, videos, or repair advice.

This Agreement does not transfer any intellectual property rights in the App to the User, other than the limited license to use expressly granted herein.
offer.warranty_text: The App is provided "as is" and "as available", without warranties of any kind, express or implied. OBD2 Auto Codes is an informational reference tool and does not replace professional vehicle diagnostics, inspection, or repair advice. The Studio does not warrant that code descriptions, causes, or external references will be complete, error-free, or suitable for every vehicle.

zodiacCompatibility.name: Zodiac Match
zodiacCompatibility.subtitle: Zodiac sign compatibility
zodiacCompatibility.desc_short: A lighthearted app to explore compatibility among all 12 zodiac signs in love, marriage, friendship, and work. 144 combinations, 27 languages, offline data. Ad-supported.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Zorya Tech Studio ("we", "us", "our") built Zodiac Match — an entertainment zodiac compatibility app for Android. Zodiac Match is intended for entertainment and general information; it does not predict the future and is not a substitute for professional medical, psychological, legal, or financial advice. This Privacy Policy explains how we handle information when you use the app.
privacy.collect_text: We do not collect personal data directly. The app requires no registration, account, or sign-in. We do not request or store your name, email address, phone number, birth date, or location. However, Google AdMob may collect a device advertising identifier, IP address, and usage data in accordance with Google's own policies.
privacy.storage_text: Language, theme, onboarding status, result view counter, and recent sign pairs are stored exclusively on your device using SharedPreferences. Compatibility texts are built into the app and work offline. No data is transmitted to our servers — we do not operate any server infrastructure for storing user data.
privacy.permissions_text: Zodiac Match requests only the minimum permissions needed for ads and consent management. The app does not access the microphone, camera, location, contacts, or any other sensitive device data:
privacy.permissions_internet: Internet — required to load ads from Google AdMob. The main compatibility content works offline; the network is used for ads and, where required, a consent form.
privacy.permissions_ad_id: Advertising ID (AD_ID) — used by Google AdMob to serve relevant ads. You can reset or opt out of this identifier at any time in your device's Google settings.
privacy.permissions_consent: Consent form (UMP) — in regions where required by law, the app may show a form to manage ad consent. You can change your choice in the app settings ("Privacy options") when that option is available.
privacy.third_text: Zodiac Match displays ads via Google AdMob (a banner on the result screen and full-screen interstitials after viewing compatibility results). AdMob may collect device identifiers, IP address, and usage data per its own policy:
privacy.third_admob: displays ads. May collect device identifiers, IP address, and usage data for serving personalized or non-personalized ads.
privacy.children_text: Zodiac Match is not directed at children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect information from children under 13. If you believe your child has provided us with any information, please contact us and we will delete it.
privacy.changes_text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date.
privacy.contact_text: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Zorya Tech Studio ("we", "us", "our") respects your privacy. This policy describes how we collect, use, and protect your information when using our mobile applications.
privacy.collect_text: Our apps do not require registration and do not collect personal information directly. However, our apps use third-party services that may automatically collect certain data:
privacy.collect_firebase_text: Collects anonymous usage data such as app opens, screen views, session duration, device model, OS version, country, and language. This data is used to understand how users interact with our apps and to improve functionality. No personally identifiable information is collected.
privacy.collect_admob_text: Displays ads within our apps. AdMob may collect device identifiers, IP address, and usage data to serve personalized or non-personalized ads. You can opt out of personalized ads in your device settings.
privacy.use_text: We use analytics data solely to improve app quality, fix bugs, and understand general usage patterns. We do not sell, trade, or transfer your data to outside parties.
privacy.third_text: Our apps use the following third-party services that have their own privacy policies:
privacy.third_firebase: Firebase Analytics — Google Privacy Policy: https://policies.google.com/privacy
privacy.security_text: We take reasonable measures to protect your information, but no method of transmission over the Internet is completely secure.
privacy.changes_text: We may update this policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated date.
privacy.contact_text: If you have questions about this privacy policy, contact us at:
